filter.name: SAFETY + IDEMPOTENCY: all four gates must pass

mapper.subject: Your {{if(ifempty(1.fields.Brand; "SSS") = "ME"; "Mare Executive"; "She Said Sail")}} Charter is Confirmed! 🎉
mapper.body:
Hi {{first(split(ifempty(2.fields.Name; ifempty(1.fields.Client Name; "Valued Guest")); " "))}},

Your charter is officially confirmed! We cannot wait to create an unforgettable experience for you.

Booking Details:

  • Date: {{formatDate(1.fields.Charter Date; "MMMM D, YYYY")}}
  • Experience: {{1.fields.Yacht Name}}
  • Guests: {{1.fields.Guest Count}}
  • Occasion: {{1.fields.Occasion}}
  • Boarding Location: {{1.fields.Boarding Location}}
  • Booking Reference: {{ifempty(1.fields.Booking ID; 1.id)}}

Your dedicated concierge will be in touch in the next 48 hours with everything you need to know before your charter.

In the meantime, please don't hesitate to reply to this email with any questions.

We'll see you on the water.

Warmly,
The {{if(ifempty(1.fields.Brand; "SSS") = "ME"; "Mare Executive"; "She Said Sail")}} Team

{"to": "{{ifempty(2.fields.Phone; 1.fields.Client Phone)}}", "body": "Hi {{first(split(ifempty(2.fields.Name; ifempty(1.fields.Client Name; \"Valued Guest\")); \" \"))}}! Your {{if(ifempty(1.fields.Brand; \"SSS\") = \"ME\"; \"Mare Executive\"; \"She Said Sail\")}} charter on {{formatDate(1.fields.Charter Date; \"MMMM D, YYYY\")}} is confirmed! 🎉 Your concierge will reach out in the next 48 hours. Questions? Email hello@shesaidsail.com — Reply STOP to opt out."}

{"triggering_event": "Booking Status = CONFIRMED — Booking Confirmation Send", "source_data": "Booking: {{ifempty(1.fields.Booking ID; 1.id)}}, Client: {{first(split(ifempty(2.fields.Name; ifempty(1.fields.Client Name; \"Valued Guest\")); \" \"))}}, Date: {{formatDate(1.fields.Charter Date; \"MMMM D, YYYY\")}}, Email: {{ifempty(2.fields.Email; 1.fields.Client Email)}}", "output": "Confirmation email sent to {{ifempty(2.fields.Email; 1.fields.Client Email)}}. Confirmation SMS sent to {{ifempty(2.fields.Phone; 1.fields.Client Phone)}}. Confirmation_Sent = true. D0 Sent = true.", "approval_state": "AUTONOMOUS", "brand": "{{ifempty(1.fields.Brand; \"SSS\")}}", "city": "{{1.fields.City}}", "environment": "Production", "destination": "Gmail + Quo SMS + Airtable Bookings"}

{"alert_type": "OPS", "severity": "INFO", "title": "✅ Booking Confirmed — Confirmation Sent", "body": "{{ifempty(1.fields.Client Name; first(split(ifempty(2.fields.Name; \"Valued Guest\"); \" \")))}}} — {{1.fields.Yacht Name}} — {{formatDate(1.fields.Charter Date; \"MMMM D, YYYY\")}}. Confirmation email and SMS sent.", "booking_id": "{{ifempty(1.fields.Booking ID; 1.id)}}", "city": "{{1.fields.City}}", "brand": "{{ifempty(1.fields.Brand; \"SSS\")}}"}

metadata.notes: REBINDING REQUIRED: Airtable connection (modules 1, 2, 5), Gmail connection (module 3). PLACEHOLDERS: replace PASTE_QUO_API_KEY_HERE (module 4 — Quo SMS), PASTE_SLACK_ALERTS_WEBHOOK_URL_HERE (module 7 — SSS-SLACK-ALERTS webhook URL). Audit logger URL is live (module 6). SAFETY CHAIN (filter on module 2): Automations_Paused notEqual true AND Emergency_Flag notEqual true AND Concierge_Assigned equal true AND Confirmation_Sent notEqual true — all four gates in a single AND filter. Trigger: Bookings Status = CONFIRMED, Confirmation_Sent = 0, Environment = Production. Reads Client record (module 2) for fresh email/phone/name. Writes: Confirmation_Sent = true, D0 Sent = true.
